title: Gan Fall and Chopper Struggle
description: Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.
scene: Across pages 11, 12, 13, 14, this scene centers on Chopper, Gedatsu, Gan Fall, Nami, Zoro. Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.

dialogue.speaker: Gedatsu
dialogue.text: SA SA SA SA SA SA SA...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: We've been sailing for a long time!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: There is sunset on Sky Island, too...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Of course not!!! He was attacked!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...Did the attacker chop him into pieces?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't make up scary thoughts like that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They seem full of spirit... that's good.

summary: Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.
